summary: iter191 comprehensive testing complete. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully verified: /m/staff/:token mobile shell works with role-gated rendering (GENERAL shows basic tiles, SALARY shows KPI command centre + admin palette entries). Role Assigner backend endpoints working. All regressions passed (Guest Concierge auto-auth, /m/briefing, Panel Host root).

ui_bugs.issue: Echo command launcher button (data-testid='echo-cmd-launcher') overlays the bottom tab bar, intercepting clicks. Workaround: use JavaScript click or force=True

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/staff-mobile/employees correctly returns union of employees + active briefing tokens, deduped by email/name key
POST /api/staff-mobile/employees/role validates role ∈ {general, salary, manager, owner}, returns 400 for invalid roles
Role assignment creates stub employee record if not exists (source='role_assigner_stub')
GET /api/staff-mobile/me capability flags correctly change when role is updated (tested general→salary→manager promotion)
StaffMobile component correctly gates UI based on capability flags (is_salary, can_view_dashboard, can_approve_pto, etc.)
Command palette shows admin entries only for salary+ roles (palette-dashboard, palette-standup-edit, palette-briefing-admin, palette-pto-queue)
Concierge and Briefing tabs render iframes to /m/concierge/:token and /m/briefing/:token respectively
seed_data_creation: Created test tokens for general and salary roles, promoted priya.p@luccca.com to salary role
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter191 fully tested. Features: (1) GET /api/staff-mobile/employees (admin) returns {ok, total, employees, roles} - union of employees collection + active briefing_mobile_tokens, deduped; (2) POST /api/staff-mobile/employees/role (admin) assigns role, validates role ∈ {general, salary, manager, owner}, creates stub if employee doesn't exist; (3) GET /api/staff-mobile/me capability flags change correctly when role updated - tested general→salary→manager promotion chain; (4) /m/staff/:token route renders StaffMobile component with data-testid='staff-mobile-root', role pill (staff-role-pill), 5-tab bottom nav (tab-home, tab-schedule, tab-concierge, tab-briefing, tab-more); (5) Home tab: general role shows quick tiles (home-pto, home-benefits, home-briefing, home-concierge), salary+ shows KPI command centre (On property, Arrivals, VIP, Alerts) + Admin quick section; (6) Schedule tab: PTO form with pto-start, pto-end, pto-kind, pto-reason, pto-submit, pto-flash, pto-row-{id}, pto-cancel-{id}; (7) More tab: benefits-list with 8 benefit items, Admin tools section only for salary+ (admin-dashboard, admin-briefing-edit, admin-mint-tokens, admin-pto-approve, admin-hiring); (8) Command palette: home-palette-btn opens command-palette with palette-input, basic entries (palette-home, palette-schedule, palette-concierge, palette-briefing, palette-benefits), admin entries for salary+ (palette-dashboard, palette-standup-edit, palette-briefing-admin, palette-pto-queue); (9) Concierge/Briefing tabs render iframes to /m/concierge/:token and /m/briefing/:token; (10) Daily Briefing Admin shows both /m/briefing and /m/staff URLs after mint (briefing-admin-copy, briefing-admin-copy-staff). MOCKED: Dashboard /api/dashboard/today and Stratus alerts may 404 - KPI tiles gracefully show '—' fallbacks.
